hero.title: When did the world
hero.thankYouMessage: Thank you for sharing your moment.
statements: When I couldn't afford rent anymore
When the algorithm chose my news
After COVID, nothing felt the same
The 2008 crash — everything after was pretend
When my kids stopped trusting institutions
Climate anxiety hit me all at once
The day I deleted social media

metaphor.heading: The Shift
metaphor.paragraph1: We call it the "new normal," but that implies stability. It wasn't a return to normal; it was a change in the
metaphor.paragraph2: The mainstream didn't just shift; it dissolved into parallel realities.
metaphor.paragraph3: Yet, most strategies are still built for a world that no longer exists.
metaphor.sideQuote: Culture shifts like tectonic plates — slowly, then all at once.

businessReality.label: The Business Reality
businessReality.heading: Would you build a high-rise without a geological survey?
businessReality.bodyParagraph1: In construction, before a single beam is laid, engineers test the ground. They look for load-bearing capacity, hidden water tables, and fault lines.
businessReality.bodyParagraph2: In business, organisations routinely pour strategic foundations without testing the cultural soil.
businessReality.overlapParagraph1: They run surveys that validate internal assumptions.
businessReality.overlapParagraph2: They test language that was written inside a boardroom.
businessReality.overlapConclusion: This isn't ground inspection. It's blueprint confirmation. And in unstable terrain, blueprint confirmation is a liability.

steps.title: Listen
steps.description: We map the "underground" drivers of culture — the anxieties, identities, and signals that shape decisions.

steps.title: Measure
steps.description: We quantify the weight each narrative can carry — statistically, demographically, nationally.

steps.title: Stress-Test
steps.description: We calculate if your strategy can survive on this terrain — before you break ground.

deliverable.label: The Deliverable
deliverable.heading: Foundation before Facade.
deliverable.bodyText: If your foundation is weak, the cracks won't appear on day one. They will appear as:
deliverable.conclusion: Most business failures are not creative failures.

insurance.heading: We provide the insurance policy for your reality:

promises.text: Early detection of cultural fault lines.
Confidence to build for the long term.

insurance.ctaSubtext: Let's inspect the ground your customers are standing on.
